metadata.name: Log a Paint Defect for Punch List

description: During a final walkthrough, a quality inspector finds an issue with the paint finish in the main lobby and needs to add it to the punch list.

nodes.task_description: Create a new punch list item for the 'Main Lobby'.

expected_outcome.value: A new punch list item is created.

nodes.task_description: Describe the issue as 'Uneven paint finish on the west wall' and assign it to the painting subcontractor.

expected_outcome.value: The punch list item is updated with the description and assigned to the correct subcontractor.

nodes.task_description: Attach a photo of the defect to the punch list item.

expected_outcome.value: A photo is successfully linked to the item for clarification.
